notFound.title: This page got lost in the field
notFound.lead1: The requested address was not detected during repeated surveying.
notFound.lead2: It may have been relocated, removed, or changed operating mode without notice.
notFound.authorityNote: If you are responding to a request from a regional hygiene station, environmental inspectorate, regional authority or building office, send us the notice, project documentation or a brief description of the operation. We will help determine whether you need measurements, a study, an expert report or operating documentation.
notFound.illustrationAlt: Illustration: measurement device showing error 404 and a measurement protocol under a magnifying glass

site.metaTitleDefault: NATURCHEM, s.r.o. | Accredited measurements and consulting
site.metaDescription: Accredited emission, workplace and noise measurements. Dispersion studies, EIA, expert reports and environmental consulting.

home.metaDescription: Accredited emission and workplace measurements, dispersion and noise studies, EIA, expert reports, operating rules, IPPC, ISPOP and GHG — for operators, investors and the public sector.
home.heroTitle: Accredited measurements, studies and documentation for authorities
home.heroLead: We take care of everything your operation needs — for operators, investors and designers, without having to source multiple suppliers.

contact.metaDescription: Send us a brief description or attachments from the authority. We will review the situation and propose the next steps — form or direct contact.
contact.title: Get in touch — we are happy to help
contact.lead: A short description or an attachment from the authority is enough. We will assess the situation and get back to you with next steps.
contact.mapConsentLead: The interactive map loads third-party services (Google Maps or OpenStreetMap). It appears after you consent to statistical cookies.

contactForm.successTitle: Thank you — we received your message
contactForm.formLead: You do not need everything prepared. A short message or attachment is enough — we will get back to you and agree on what makes sense.
contactForm.messagePlaceholder: For example an authority notice, operation description, deadline, what you already have…
contactForm.attachmentTooltip: PDF, Word, Excel, image or ZIP — max. 7 MB per file.
contactForm.consentPrefix: I agree to the processing of personal data for handling this inquiry according to the
contactForm.contactRequired: Please provide an email or phone number so we can get back to you.
contactForm.contactChannelHint: Provide an email or phone number — at least one is required so we can reply.
contactForm.successMessage: We will get back to you with next steps. If we need anything else, we will let you know by email or phone.
contactForm.sendFailure: We could not send the message. Email {email} or call {phone}.
contactForm.fallbackIntro: The form cannot be displayed right now. Email us at
contactForm.surveyAfterSuccess: Worked with us recently? We would appreciate brief feedback in our

satisfactionSurvey.metaDescription: Short survey for NATURCHEM clients — rate cooperation, communication and deliverable quality. Helps us improve our services.
satisfactionSurvey.title: How satisfied are you with our cooperation?
satisfactionSurvey.lead: It takes only a few minutes. Your rating helps us maintain the quality of measurements, studies and authority communication.
satisfactionSurvey.formLead: Only the overall rating is required — but the more you share, the better we understand what works and what to improve.
satisfactionSurvey.npsLegend: Would you recommend NATURCHEM to colleagues or partners?
satisfactionSurvey.positivesPlaceholder: E.g. quick response, clear report, help with the authority…
satisfactionSurvey.improvementsPlaceholder: Anything that would make future cooperation easier.
satisfactionSurvey.consentPrefix: I agree to processing data from this survey according to the
satisfactionSurvey.successMessage: We received your rating. It helps us improve cooperation with you and other clients.
satisfactionSurvey.sendFailure: We could not send the survey. Email {email} or call {phone}.
